description: A structured JSON onboarding packet for AI agents discovering Octodamus via Smithery MCP. Includes: what each tool does, when to call it, how to get an API key, sample output for get_agent_signal and get_polymarket_edge, and recommended polling cadence. Designed so a cold agent can go from zero to productive in one call.
what_it_delivers: JSON object: { tools_guide: [...], api_key_url: string, sample_signal: {...}, sample_polymarket_edge: {...}, recommended_cadence: string, quick_start_snippet: string }. Returned instantly, cached 1h.
